title: Disrupción de la computación cuántica en el sistema financiero y de pagos
summary: Banco Central del Uruguay analytical/literature-review document for central banks and financial-system regulators on the disruption of quantum computing to the financial and payments system. It explicitly addresses post-quantum cryptography, referencing NIST's PQC standardisation and the transition to quantum-resistant algorithms (including hybrid post-quantum cryptographic protocols tested between central banks).

title: Estrategia Nacional de Ciberseguridad del Uruguay 2024 - 2030
summary: Uruguay's national cybersecurity strategy 2024-2030, led by AGESIC and approved by the CAHSI council, structured around eight pillars including critical information infrastructure. Post-quantum cryptography (PQC) was raised in the public-consultation proposals and reportedly suggested for line 5.2, but the explicit PQC reference could not be confirmed in the official strategy body text (the published Pillar 5 page contains no PQC mention), so this entry is flagged for human review rather than auto-included.
